ul.li: Type: Message discriminator. Required for routing.
Flags: Control bits. [7:2] Reserved, [1] Retain, [0] QoS Level.

ol.li: Thread Safety: All concurrent map access MUST be protected by sync.RWMutex.
Memory Leak Protection: Every spawned goroutine must defer cleanup logic.
Socket Config: TCP KeepAlives should be tuned to 60s for early dead-peer detection.
Optimization: Use sync.Pool for []byte buffers during frame parsing to mitigate GC latency.
